_meta.purpose: Shared prompt-filter baseline. Loaded by app/core/prompt_filters.py and merged with the per-world `prompt_filters` table (world overrides shared by id).

schema.id: stable identifier; world entries with the same id replace the shared one
schema.label: human-readable description for admin UI
schema.drop_blocks: list of *_block keys to clear from the thought context (block disappears from the prompt)
schema.prompt_modifier: text appended to the effects/state section so the LLM sees the active state
schema.enabled: if false, the filter is loaded but not applied

filters.label: Drunk — clouded memory
filters.prompt_modifier: You are drunk. Recent conversations feel fuzzy and you can't remember details clearly.

filters.label: Exhausted — only home and sleep matter
filters.prompt_modifier: You are exhausted. All you can think about is getting home and sleeping.
